demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up gasping for air with a terrible burning pressure in my chest, and I can taste battery acid in the back of my throat. It scared the life out of me — I'm worried it's my heart.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning chest pain woke me a few hours after I fell asleep and it came on straight after a big late spicy meal; I'm home alone and frightened it could be a heart attack.

symptom_narrative.onset: woke me about three hours after I fell asleep, straight after a heavy, spicy late-night meal
symptom_narrative.duration: going on for the last hour or so tonight
symptom_narrative.character: a burning, pressing pain right behind my breastbone, with sour acid coming up into my throat and mouth
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe and frightening — it woke me from a dead sleep and made me choke and panic
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the middle of my chest behind the breastbone, and up into my throat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on at night lying down; I've had milder heartburn like this before but never this bad
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sipping the liquid antacid helped a little for a short while, and I feel a bit better sitting up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat makes it much worse, so I won't lie down
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sour, acidic fluid and a sudden rush of salty watery spit in my mouth; a niggly night-time cough and a lot of throat-clearing in the mornings; burping a lot
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get heartburn now and then after big meals but nothing that ever woke me up gasping like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been pacing the room and I'm too scared to lie back down in case the pain or the choking gets worse

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious about his heart tonight; had a large heavy spicy meal late in the evening

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened, focused on the fear of a heart attack, seeking urgent reassurance

access_barriers.other: lives alone with no one present to help or drive him if he deteriorates
